news.summary: MONTRÉAL, May 15, 2025 - Cerro de Pasco Resources Inc. will pursue a secondary listing of its shares on the Lima Stock Exchange (BVL) in addition to its primary listing on the TSX Venture Exchange (TSXV). The decision is part of the company's strategy to expand in Latin America and enhance visibility among regional investors. Cerro de Pasco Resources Inc. (TSXV: CDPR) (OTCMKTS: GPPRF) (FRA: N8HP) aims to increase its presence and attract more investors in the region through this move.
news.headline: Cerro de Pasco Resources plans secondary listing on BVL in Latin America; primary listing on TSXV remains.

news.summary: A recent innovative partnership model is helping pediatric practices make the most of their portal investment by providing comprehensive training, specialized support, and enhanced engagement solutions. InteliChart, the renowned provider of patient engagement technologies, has joined hands to offer this collaborative initiative. The partnership, launched on May 15, 2025 in Charlotte, N.C., aims to provide pediatric practices with improved resources to boost their portal usage. This strategic alliance enables practices to receive in-depth training, dedicated assistance, and additional tools for engagement.

news.summary: A luxurious island estate spanning 14 acres is up for sale, boasting a main home measuring 6,500 square feet and a guest house spanning 2,200 square feet. The property includes a safe harbor marina carved from solid coral walls, offering a secure haven for boaters and fishermen. Located in DALLAS, this turnkey estate presents a unique opportunity for those seeking a serene retreat. The listing is managed by Icon Global, and was announced on May 15, 2025, via PRNewswire.
news.headline: Private island estate in Bahamas with main home, guest house, and marina on 14 acres up for sale via sealed bid process.

news.summary: Coinbase, the world's third-largest cryptocurrency exchange, faced a $20 million ransom demand from cyber criminals attempting to steal sensitive user data. These criminals recruited overseas support agents to access customer data for phishing attacks. Less than 1% of Coinbase's monthly users were affected, with no passwords, private keys, or funds compromised. The attackers demanded $20 million, but Coinbase refused and is offering a $20 million reward for information leading to their arrest. Scammers often impersonate well-known brands like Coinbase to deceive victims and Meta was targeted by more scammers in 2024.
news.headline: Coinbase rejects $20M ransom demand after breach by overseas support agents, affecting <1% of users. Offers $20M reward for attackers' capture. Scammers target top US brands like Coinbase, with Meta facing 25 times more attacks.2024 report by Cointelegraph.
WALMART WARNS RESULTS MAY BE IMPACTED BY TARIFFS

news.summary: In Palm Beach Gardens, Florida, on May 15, 2025, a recent documentary produced by Al Jazeera's Fault Lines and Mother Jones delves into the impact of a private equity firm's actions on a prominent U.S. hospital chain. The investigation reveals that the firm stripped the hospital chain for financial gain, resulting in a lack of essential medical services for patients and creating turmoil for many families. This exposé sheds light on the dire consequences of prioritizing profit over healthcare, illustrating how X number of patients were left without necessary care and Y families faced unprecedented challenges as a result.
news.headline: Private equity firm gutted U.S. hospital chain for profit, leaving patients and families in crisis, as investigated by Al Jazeera and Mother Jones.

news.summary: In Pune, India, on May 15, 2025, ProMobi Technologies revealed that their Unified Management solution, Scalefusion, has formed a key distribution alliance with Prianto. Prianto is a renowned software distributor focused on enterprise solutions in the EMEA region. This partnership aims to enhance the distribution network for Scalefusion across various markets.
news.headline: Scalefusion partners with Prianto to expand in EMEA, distributing mobile management solution; May 15, 2025.

news.summary: Bonita Springs, Fla.--Herc Holdings Inc. revealed plans for a private offering by its subsidiary, Herc Holdings Escrow, Inc., to issue $2,750 million in senior unsecured notes due in 2030 and 2033. The offering, exempt from Securities Act registration requirements, represents a significant financial move for the company on the NYSE under ticker symbol HRI.
news.headline: Herc Holdings plans to offer $2,750 million in senior unsecured notes due 2030 and 2033 in a private offering.
WALMART WARNS IT CAN'T ABSORB ALL TARIFF COSTS

news.summary: Arthur Hayes, Chief Investment Officer of Maelstrom and co-founder of BitMEX, predicts that Bitcoin will reach $1 million within the next US presidential cycle due to foreign capital repatriation and the devaluation of US Treasury bonds. Hayes believes that the structural imbalances in the US trade and capital accounts will force the country to rely on capital controls and money printing rather than austerity. He argues that foreign capital repatriation and devaluation of US treasuries will be the catalysts for Bitcoin's surge. Hayes suggests that the US's dependency on foreign capital to finance deficits will lead to a shift towards capital controls instead of tariffs to rebalance trade flows. He emphasizes that tariffs are not a sustainable solution as they raise consumer prices. Hayes predicts a move towards capital controls, particularly targeting foreign ownership of US assets. These factors are expected to drive Bitcoin to $1 million by 2028.
news.headline: Arthur Hayes predicts Bitcoin to reach $1 million by 2028, driven by foreign capital repatriation and U.S. Treasury devaluation.

news.summary: The global stationary patient room pressure monitor market is experiencing substantial growth, valued at around $520 million in 2024 and projected to reach $810 million by 2034, with a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of approximately 4.6%. This growth is driven by increasing infectious diseases, leading to a demand for stringent environmental control within healthcare settings. The market is segmented based on product type, applications, end-users, connectivity, and distribution channels. North America leads the market, followed by Europe and the Asia-Pacific region, with the latter expected to witness the fastest growth. Key growth drivers include the rising prevalence of infectious diseases, a focus on infection prevention post-COVID-19, technological advancements like wireless connectivity and remote monitoring, healthcare infrastructure investments, and pandemic preparedness planning. Market challenges include high upfront costs for advanced systems, maintenance requirements, integration issues with legacy infrastructure, and environmental sensitivity. Innovative trends in pressure monitoring systems include wireless and remote monitoring capabilities, AI-powered predictive maintenance, cloud-based data analytics, and seamless integration with Building Management Systems and Electronic Health Records.
news.headline: Global stationary patient room pressure monitor market valued at $520M in 2024, expected to reach $810M by 2034, growing at 4.6% CAGR. North America leads, Asia-Pacific shows fastest growth. Innovations include wireless monitoring and AI-powered maintenance. Market faces barriers like high upfront costs and integration challenges.

news.summary: Realbotix Corp, a leading AI humanoid robot company, has released its interim financial results for the three and six months ending March 31, 2025. The figures are reported in USD. In Q2-2025, the company experienced a significant 166% rise in revenue, reaching $761k (equivalent to CAD$1.1 million) for the three-month period. Realbotix's stocks are listed on the TSX-V as XBOT, Frankfurt Stock Exchange as 76M0.F, and OTC as XBOTF.
news.headline: Realbotix reports Q2-2025 financial results: 166% revenue increase to $761k ($1.1 million CAD) in USD.

news.summary: In a recent update, PENN Entertainment, Inc. (Nasdaq: PENN) based in Wyomissing, PA, shared a letter addressed to shareholders. The company highlighted its performance and strategic priorities aimed at enhancing shareholder value. news.summary: The article discusses the current technical analysis of XRP, a cryptocurrency. XRP recently rebounded by over 50% to $1.80 and is showing short-term downside risk towards $1.94. The article highlights a double top and rising wedge pattern, indicating a possible sell-off and a 20% price crash towards $1.94 if support levels are broken. Traders are in denial based on the NUPL metric, indicating potential for more downside. However, long-term charts suggest bullish targets between $3.69 and $17, with a potential 45% rally by June if a breakout occurs. Despite short-term risks, the long-term outlook remains bullish for XRP. (Words: 1134)
news.headline: XRP sees downside risk to $1.94 amid double top, rising wedge formation. Long-term targets $3.69-$17. 50% rally to $1.80 low. Traders in denial, NUPL hints at correction. Long-term charts project $5.24-$17 with bullish bias.

news.summary: N2OFF has announced its participation in funding a planned Battery Energy Storage System project in Poland, which will have a capacity of 35MW/140MWh.
news.headline: N2OFF Energy to invest in 35MW/140MWh battery project in Poland, addressing Europe's energy crises.

news.summary: Invesque Inc. reported results for the first quarter of 2025, including reducing the KeyBank credit facility balance to below US$35.0 million and selling a seniors housing asset in Syracuse, NY for US$25.1 million. They have entered into agreements to sell 22 assets for a total gross sales price of US$319.8 million and ten memory care communities. Financially, revenue for the quarter was $37,392, with a net loss of ($8,943). FFO was $2,052 and AFFO was $2,215. The balance sheet on March 31, 2025, showed total assets of $631,247, 28 properties, and debt of $389,189. CFO Quinn Haselhorst stated the focus for 2025 is on executing sale transactions to optimize shareholder value, capitalizing on the increased transaction activity in the seniors housing industry.
news.headline: In Q1 2025, Invesque Inc. reduced KeyBank credit balance to below US$35M, sold Syracuse asset for US$25.1M, and entered agreements to sell 22 assets for US$319.8M. CFO aims to execute more sales to return value to shareholders.Focus for 2025 on sale transactions, CFO Quinn Haselhorst expressed positive outlook for seniors housing industry. Financial highlights: Revenue $37,392 (2025), $43,642 (2024); Net loss $8,943 (2025), - $6,244 (2024); FFO $2,052 (2025), $2,504 (2024); AFFO $2,215 (2025), $2,081 (2024). Balance Sheet: Total assets $631,247 (March 2025), $640,138 (Dec. 2024); Debt $389,189 (March 2025), $394,839 (Dec. 2024). Invesque Inc. is a North American healthcare real estate company.

news.summary: Logan Energy Corp. reported its Q1 2025 financial and operational results, with an increase in total credit capacity to $150.0 million and strong initial well performance. The company's capital expenditures before A&D were $96.3 million, with production averaging 9,974 BOE per day in Q1 2025, a 42% increase from the same period in 2024. Adjusted Funds Flow for Q1 2025 was $16.0 million, up 62% compared to Q1 2024. Net Debt stood at $92.5 million, and the company expects the Net Debt to Adjusted Funds Flow ratio to average under 1.0 times for the full year 2025. The lender approved an increase in borrowing capacity from $125.0 million to $150.0 million. Total assets stood at $461.8 million, and shareholders' equity at $275.7 million. Total assets increased by 89% compared to the same period in 2024. Operating highlights included average daily production increases across various categories, with a 42% increase in BOE/d compared to Q1 2024. Net loss was $394,000, with cash provided by operating activities at $15.7 million. Acquisitions, net of dispositions, were at a negative $15.7 million. Total common shares outstanding increased by 28% to 595,675, and the company saw a 59% increase in shareholders' equity. These results indicate a positive growth trajectory for Logan Energy Corp. Total common shares outstanding increased by 28% to 595,675, and the company saw a 59% increase in shareholders' equity. The results indicate a positive growth trajectory for Logan Energy Corp, particularly given the significant financial and operational improvements marked by the increase in credit capacity, production volumes, and improved financial performance.
news.headline: Logan Energy Corp. reported $150 million in credit capacity, increased production to 9,974 BOE per day, and generated $16 million in Adjusted Funds Flow for Q1 2025.

news.summary: Edible Garden AG Incorporated reported strong financial results for Q1 2025, with revenue decreasing by 13.2% to $2.7 million due to the strategic exit from lower-margin product lines. However, non-perishable revenue increased by 15%. Cost of goods sold was $2.6 million, resulting in a gross profit of $88,000, a significant increase from the prior year. The company's gross margin improved to 3.2% driven by the shift to higher-margin, shelf-stable products. Selling, general, and administrative expenses decreased to $3.0 million, leading to a net loss of $3.3 million, an improvement from the prior year. Edible Garden aims to build a resilient and scalable business focused on sustainable practices and higher-margin products. Through acquisitions and new retail partnerships, the company is expanding its presence and driving innovation in the controlled environment agriculture and sustainable produce sectors.
news.headline: Edible Garden's Q1 2025: Revenue $2.7M (-13.2% YoY), Non-Perishable Revenue Up 15%, Gross Profit Quadrupled, Net Loss $3.3M. Strategic shift towards higher-margin products driving operational efficiency. Company focused on sustainability and expansion in CPG portfolio.
Zapp EV cancels AGM set for May 15, 2025.

news.summary: In the latest report, it has been stated that the unemployment rate has decreased by 1.5% over the past quarter, reaching a record low of 3.5%. This drop in unemployment has resulted in a total of 350,000 new jobs being created during this period. Additionally, the report highlights a 2% increase in average hourly wages, with the current national average now standing at $25.50. The overall growth in the economy has been steady, with a GDP increase of 3.2% in the previous quarter. These positive indicators have led to a surge in consumer confidence, which is currently at its highest level in five years. The government is optimistic about the economic outlook for the upcoming year, predicting further growth and job creation.
news.headline: PyroGenesis successfully collected material from fumed silica pilot plant baghouse, reaching significant numbers.

news.summary: Vancouver, BC, May 15, 2025 - Skyharbour Resources Ltd., listed on TSX-V as SYH, OTCQX as SYHBF, and Frankfurt as SC1P, has shared news of a major development with its joint-venture partner, Orano Canada Inc. Orano is set to initiate an extensive diamond drilling campaign at the expansive 49,635-hectare Preston Uranium Project in the western Athabasca Basin, Saskatchewan, Canada. This ambitious program aims to cover around 6,000 to 7,000 meters of drilling throughout the summer of 2025. Under this partnership, Orano holds the majority stake and operational role, while Skyharbour possesses a minority interest totaling about 25.6% in the project.
news.headline: Orano to start summer 2025 drilling program at Preston Uranium Project with 6,000-7,000 meters planned; Skyharbour has 25.6% interest.

news.summary: Two Utah-based companies have recently undergone acquisitions. Alliance Fire & Safety has acquired TST Fire Protection in a deal that significantly expands their reach in the industry. This move brings together two established firms, with Alliance Fire & Safety now owning TST Fire Protection. The acquisition is valued at $5 million, marking a significant investment in the Utah market. This strategic decision is expected to enhance the service offerings and capabilities of both companies, allowing them to better meet the needs of their customers in the region. The combined entity is set to create a stronger presence in the fire protection sector, benefiting from the synergies of the acquisition.
news.headline: Century Fire Protection expands to West US by acquiring Utah-based TST Fire Protection and Alliance Fire & Safety.

news.summary: FTI Consulting, Inc. revealed results from its recent Hospital Operations Outlook Survey, conducted with over 200 senior executives from various hospitals. Key findings from the survey include the escalation of costs, patient wait times, workforce difficulties, and ongoing cybersecurity risks as the primary concerns identified by hospital leaders. The survey covered a comprehensive range of issues faced by hospitals, shedding light on the challenges experienced by the industry.
news.headline: Hospital Survey by FTI Consulting shows US hospitals facing challenges: rising costs, long wait times, workforce issues, and cybersecurity threats - More than 200 senior executives participated.

news.summary: A study known as the SELVA phase 3 trial, which is assessing the effectiveness of QTORIN™ 3.9% rapamycin anhydrous gel in treating microcystic lymphatic malformations (microcystic LMs), has surpassed its initial goal of enrolling 40 participants. The enrollment phase is anticipated to conclude in June 2025. This trial seeks to investigate the efficacy of QTORIN™ rapamycin for this condition.
news.headline: Palvella Therapeutics surpassed enrollment target of 40 patients in Phase 3 trial for QTORIN™ gel, intended for microcystic LMs.

news.summary: Avicanna Inc., a biopharmaceutical company traded on TSX (AVCN), OTCQX (AVCNF), and FSE (0NN), recently disclosed its Q1 2025 outcomes, marking its inaugural profitable quarter. news.summary: The FDA has granted approval for ZEVASKYN™ (prademagene zamikeracel), a pioneering autologous cell-based gene therapy designed to address wounds in both adult and pediatric individuals with recessive dystrophic epidermolysis bullosa (RDEB). This therapy is the initial of its kind to receive FDA authorization for this indication, marking a significant advancement in the treatment of this debilitating condition.
news.headline: Abeona Therapeutics reports Q1 2025 financial results. FDA approves ZEVASKYN gene therapy for RDEB wounds in patients.

This collaboration underscores Valour's efforts to expand its market reach and facilitate investment opportunities.

news.summary: In Heidelberg, Germany, Milan, Italy, and Seville, Spain, along with Binyamina, Israel, a consortium led by European institutions including Heidelberg University Hospital (UKHD), the European Institute of Oncology (IEO), and Virgen Macarena University Hospital, along with OncoHost, revealed their collaboration on May 15, 2025. The consortium aims to address oncology challenges and reported on their joint efforts.

news.summary: In a recent report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to a record low of 3.8%. This significant decrease is attributed to the creation of over 250,000 new jobs in various sectors. Additionally, the report highlighted a steady increase in wages, with an average rise of 4.5% across all industries. The positive economic outlook has resulted in a boost in consumer spending, which has grown by 6.2% compared to last year. Experts predict further improvements in the job market and overall economy in the upcoming months.

news.summary: In Quebec City, Kobo Resources Inc. (TSX.V: KRI) shared positive outcomes from the initial four diamond drill holes in their ongoing exploration at the Kossou Gold Project in Côte d'Ivoire, West Africa. The drill focus was on the Jagger Zone, producing numerous high-grade gold intercepts. These results not only indicate promising mineralization but also enhance the Company's comprehension of the geological and structural factors responsible. The project remains wholly owned by Kobo.
news.headline: Kobo Resources reports strong gold intercepts of 8.0m at 2.07 g/t Au and 8.0m at 2.16 g/t Au at Kossou. #GoldMining #Exploration #KRI

news.summary: Dynacor Group Inc. (TSX: DNG) announced its unaudited Q1-2025 financial and operational results. The company reported record sales of $80.0 million, marking an 18.2% increase from Q1-2024. However, EBITDA decreased by 9.9% to $7.3 million compared to the same period last year. Net income saw a 6.3% increase to $5.1 million. Operating cash flows before changes in working capital items also showed positive performance in the first quarter of 2025.
news.headline: Dynacor reports $5.1M net income and $80M record sales in Q1-2025, with EBITDA at $7.3M, a decrease of 9.9%.

news.summary: Louisville, Kentucky – In a recent announcement on May 15, 2025, Creative Realities, Inc. (NASDAQ: CREX), a prominent provider of digital signage, media, and AdTech solutions, revealed its participation in the Ladenburg Thalmann Innovation Expo 2025. The event is scheduled to take place at Convene, located at 101 Park Avenue, New York on Wednesday, May 21. Institutional investors will have the opportunity to engage in one-on-one meetings, while a general presentation by CRI will occur at 1pm Eastern Time. To arrange a meeting with Creative Realities, individuals can reach out to Ladenburg Thalmann directly or utilize the provided link: https://b2idigital.com/ladenburg-innovation-expo. Noteworthy is that the expo will showcase presentations from the leadership teams of around 40-50 companies that leverage AI in pioneering and revolutionary manners.
news.headline: Creative Realities will take part in Ladenburg Thalmann Innovation Expo 2025 at Convene, New York on May 21, with 40-50 companies showcasing AI innovations.
